Both slimes at 1 HP. Eruption kills Acid Slime. Spike Slime also at 1 HP - Eruption entering Wrath should kill the Acid Slime, then end turn. If Spike survives the Wrath entry doesnt matter since it can only do tiny damage at 1 HP.

Moving to F4
F4 Monster x=6, first real fight. Then F5 Shop, F6 Elite. Continuing plan.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Fungi Beast + Louse. FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block). Fungi Beast 27 HP has Spore Cloud 2 (applies Vulnerable when it dies). Louse 17 HP has Curl Up 7 (7 block on first attack). WIN CONDITION: Kill Louse first (lower HP), then Fungi Beast. Kill Fungi last so Vulnerable doesnt matter. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Need to block each turn. I have Miracle (0E, +1E), 1 Defend, and can draw more with Cut Through Fate. TURN 1 PLAN: Play Cut Through Fate on Fungi Beast (7 dmg, draws 1, scrys 2), then assess. Use remaining energy for Strikes on Louse or blocks. KEY RISK: Ending in Wrath without exit. I have Empty Body and Vigilance in draw pile as Wrath exits.

F6 Elite - at 86% HP with 2 potions, good position for elite fight. Relic reward is very valuable for the run.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob (85 HP). FIGHT TYPE: Elite. Nob gains +2 Str per Skill I play. Minimize Skills. Turn 1 is usually Bellow (buff). PLAN: Dump attacks. I have 3 Strikes (6 each) + Cut Through Fate (7 + draw). Thats 3*6+7 = 25 damage for 4E. With Miracle I have 4E. Play Miracle (Skill, gives Nob +2 Str, but I need the energy), then 3 Strikes + Cut Through Fate. Wait - Miracle is a Skill and triggers Nob Skull Bash. Hmm. Actually I should play attacks only. 3 Strikes = 18 damage for 3E. Then end. Or play Cut Through Fate first (draws, 7 dmg) but its 1E and draws - need to use send(). Actually lets maximize damage: play all 3 Strikes (18 dmg, 3E), end turn. Save Cut Through Fate draw for next turn since I want to avoid Skills. DO NOT play Miracle - +2 Str to Nob is terrible. DO NOT play Defend either.

0 energy, 17 block vs 45 incoming (30*1.5 Vulnerable). Take 28 damage. NOT playing Miracle - it would give Nob +2 more Str.

FIGHT STRATEGY - SLIME BOSS (140 HP, Split at 70 HP). FIGHT TYPE: Boss. WIN CONDITION: Rush to 70 HP to split. After split, kill both halves. Judgment finishes at 30 HP. PLAN: Turn 1 is free (debuff). Play Eruption+ to enter Wrath, then dump damage. Need to get boss to 70 HP fast. After split, 2 medium slimes appear. Mercury Hourglass + Consecrate help with AOE. Liquid Bronze potion for Thorns. KEY RISK: Slime Boss hits hard after split. Slimed cards clog deck. TURN 1: Free turn. Miracle + Eruption+ for Wrath burst. Need exit in hand or confirmed kill.
